common.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Leave anyway?

expandRows.title: Tip: rows expand
expandRows.body: Click or tap a row to expand it and see more detail, such as who's attending each meal.

landing.heroSubtitle: One place for households, events, accommodations, and more
landing.heroDescription: Gatherstead helps extended families and organizations coordinate reunions, retreats, and recurring get-togethers — from meal planning to room assignments.
landing.featureDirectoryDesc: A shared family directory to organize members into households, with contact info, dietary profiles, and more.
landing.featurePropertiesDesc: Manage venues, cabins, and shared spaces with rooms, RV spots, and equipment for every gathering.
landing.featureEventsDesc: Plan gatherings with dates, locations, and attendee management.
landing.featureAccommodationDesc: Manage rooms, RV spaces, and stay intents so everyone has a place.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.emailFallback: Support contact details are being set up. Please check back soon.
contact.topicGroups: Creating a new group or joining an existing one

dashboard.noEventsHint: Create your first event to get started.
dashboard.waitingForEvent: Waiting for an event to be set up — check back soon.
dashboard.noShopping: You haven't claimed any shopping yet.
dashboard.tasksComingSoon: Availability, meal intents, and task sign-ups will appear here.

tenant.selectDescription: Choose which family or organization you'd like to manage.
tenant.noTenants: You're signed in, but not part of any group yet.
tenant.noTenantsHint: Ask a group admin to invite you with this email address, and your group will appear here.
tenant.dashboardPlaceholder: Your group dashboard is coming soon.

household.title: Households
household.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove all members of this household. This cannot be undone.
household.name: Household Name
household.noHouseholdsHintManager: Create your first household to get started.
household.noHouseholdsHintMember: No households have been set up yet.

member.title: Members
member.name: Name
member.noMembersHintManager: Add the first member to this household.
member.noMembersHintMember: No members have been added to this household yet.
member.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove this member and all their event data. This cannot be undone.

event.title: Events
event.name: Event Name

attendance.title: Tip: set attendance
attendance.body: Click or tap a member's row to expand it and set their attendance for each meal. Use "Bulk set attendance" or a day's ··· menu to set several people or days at once.

tasks.title: Tip: volunteer for tasks
tasks.body: Click or tap a task row to expand it and see who's volunteered, then sign up household members with the Volunteer button.

attendanceWizard.title: Set Attendance
attendanceWizard.noAttendingMembers: No members are set to attend.
attendanceWizard.detailEditReminderShort: Individual day and meal edits are available in the grid after finishing.
attendanceWizard.rerunWarning: Re-running this wizard will overwrite any individual edits you've made in the grid.

event.noEventsHintManager: Create your first event to get started.
event.noEventsHintMember: Check back soon — events will appear here.
event.accommodationsCtaTitle: Looking for a place to stay?
event.accommodationsCtaBody: Browse and request stays from the Accommodations area — we'll prefill this event's dates so you can see what fits.

noHousehold.title: No household yet
noHousehold.body: You need a household before you can sign up for this event. Create or join one from the Households area.

event.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.
event.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove this event and all its plans. This cannot be undone.
event.dateChangeHint: Changing the dates will adjust meal and task plans to match.
event.propertyLocked: The property can't be changed after creation.
event.noPropertiesHint: Add a property before creating an event.
event.templateDraftsHint: You can add meal and task templates now, or set them up after creating the event.

meal.title: Meal
meal.noTemplates: No meal plans have been set up for this event.
meal.selectMealType: Select at least one meal type.
meal.deleteConfirm: This will remove the meal and its plans. This cannot be undone.
meal.createMatchingTask: Also create a matching task to organize this meal

plan.deleteConfirm: This removes just this meal plan for this day. It won't be regenerated. This cannot be undone.

task.noTemplates: No tasks have been set up for this event.
task.selectTimeSlot: Select at least one time slot.
task.deleteConfirm: This will remove the task and its plans. This cannot be undone.

plan.deleteConfirm: This removes just this task plan for this day. It won't be regenerated. This cannot be undone.

property.title: Properties
property.name: Property Name
property.noPropertiesHintManager: Create your first property to get started.
property.noPropertiesHintMember: No properties have been added yet.
property.noAccommodationsHintManager: Create the first accommodation for this property.
property.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove this property and its accommodations. This cannot be undone.

equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.subtitle: Shared gear tracked across your group, scoped to a property.
equipment.name: Equipment Name
equipment.noEquipmentHintManager: Add your first piece of equipment to get started.
equipment.noEquipmentHintMember: No equipment has been added yet.
equipment.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove this equipment. This cannot be undone.

attribute.title: Additional Details
attribute.keyRequired: Add a label, or remove this detail with the delete button

report.title: Reports
report.subtitle: Insights across your gatherings.
report.chooseEvent: Choose an event to see attendance and meal planning details.
report.noEvents: No events to report on yet.
report.noAccess: You don't have access to reports for this group.

event.title: Event Report
event.noMeals: No meals planned for this day.
event.noData: No attendance or meal data recorded yet.
event.comingSoon: This report section is coming soon.

accommodations.title: Accommodations
accommodations.subtitle: Find a place to stay — set your party and dates to see what's available.
accommodations.noResultsHint: Try widening your dates or turning off the capacity filter to see every option.
accommodations.startHint: Choose your party size and dates, then search to see availability.
accommodations.linkRequired: Link your member profile to request a stay.

accommodation.deleteStayConfirm: This will permanently remove this stay request. This can't be undone.
accommodation.name: Accommodation Name
accommodation.deleteConfirm: This will permanently remove this accommodation and all its stays. This cannot be undone.

shopping.title: Shopping

hint.title: Tip: Shop and Edit modes
hint.body: Shop mode is for quick check-off while you shop — tap an item to claim it or mark it covered. Editors can switch to Edit mode to add or change items. Items past their need-by date are hidden unless you turn on Show past.

shopping.selectScope: Choose an event or property to see its list.
shopping.renameLocked: This item has been claimed or bought, so its name is locked. To rename it, delete it and add a new one.
shopping.deleteItemConfirm: This item will be removed from the list.
shopping.deleteItemClaimedWarning: Someone has already claimed or bought this. Deleting it will discard their contribution.
shopping.noMemberLink: Link your profile to claim items.
shopping.staleTitle: This list may be out of date
shopping.staleDescription: Others may have claimed or bought items since you last refreshed.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

error.unauthorized: You must be signed in to view this page.
error.fetchFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action
error.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
error.networkError: Unable to connect. Please check your internet connection.

apiError.INVALID_REFERENCE: That reference is invalid or no longer exists.
apiError.PERMISSION_TENANT_MANAGE: You do not have permission to manage this group's resources.
apiError.PERMISSION_EVENT_MANAGE: You do not have permission to manage events for this group.
apiError.PERMISSION_HOUSEHOLD_MANAGE: You do not have permission to manage this household.
apiError.PERMISSION_MEMBER_EDIT: You do not have permission to edit this member.
apiError.PERMISSION_INTENT_ASSIGN: You do not have permission to assign stays for this member.
apiError.PERMISSION_MEALPLAN_MENU: You do not have permission to edit this meal's menu.
apiError.PERMISSION_SENSITIVE_READ: You do not have permission to view these sensitive details.
apiError.PERMISSION_ROLE_ESCALATION: You cannot grant a role more privileged than your own.

modal.title: About Demo Mode
modal.intro: You're exploring a live preview of Gatherstead with pre-loaded sample data. Nothing here is permanent — data is stored in your browser and resets periodically.
modal.dataResets: Demo data lives in your browser's localStorage. Clearing site data or switching browsers resets everything to the original sample data.

limitReached.title: Demo Limit Reached
limitReached.description: You've reached the limit for this feature in demo mode. Sign up to continue.

account.title: Account
account.subtitle: Your profile details
account.emailHelp: Managed by your sign-in provider and can't be changed here.

tenantUser.title: Users
tenantUser.linkedMemberSessionNote: The affected user may need to refresh their page or log out and back in before this change takes effect.
tenantUser.noUsers: No users in this tenant yet.
tenantUser.removeConfirmBody: This revokes their tenant membership and all household access. They can be re-invited later.

invite.title: Invite User
invite.hint: Enter the person's email. No email is sent yet, so let them know directly. They'll join automatically the next time they sign in with this email — whether or not they already have an account.
